title: Can Monday Form be used to Recieve payment?
excerpt: I was checking through monday forms and I wanted to know if it could receive payment. if not, is there a work around?

posts.author: biye_byte (Iyebiye Faleye)
posts.cookedHtml: I was checking through monday forms and I wanted to know if it could receive payment. if not, is there a work around?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday.com is not a payment processor. You would need to use a separate payment processing service and integrate it so that orders/purchase details are sent to monday.com. There is an integration for stripe, for example, which will send purchase date to monday.com.

posts.author: biye_byte (Iyebiye Faleye)
posts.cookedHtml:
Certainly:

I understand, my question is can those payment gateways be integrated directly into the form interface? Essentially, I’m asking if sales can be completed directly through the form.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: No they cannot, because monday form fields are columns from the board.

posts.author: biye_byte (Iyebiye Faleye)
posts.cookedHtml:
I thought as much.

Thank you so much

posts.author: dominicw (Dominic)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @biye_byte ! You can use Fillout forms to integrate Stripe and Monday directly. Simply add a payment page and connect your Stripe account (there’s no additional fee on top of the Stripe fee). Then, you can integrate the form with your Monday board. Hope this helps!

posts.author: mark.stout (Mark Stout)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve integrated Stripe with my Monday.com payment board and mapped fields, and I am not getting the data from Stripe. Any idea what I might need to do that I’m not currently doing?

posts.author: denlunev (Denis Lunev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Our team actually have been working on a payment integration for Monday that might be what you’re looking for.
It allows you to handle payments (Stripe/PayPal) directly within Monday, there is a ability to create payment forms or invoices.

I recently put together a video that explains how it works — if you’re interested, you can check it out here: Payments for Monday

Let me know if you have any questions or want more details!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes. receiving payments with stripe on monday.com is now easier than ever with GetSign. Once a form is submitted, and email with Stripe payment request is sent out.

Learn more here

GetSign

Collect payment with Stripe - GetSign

Enables recipients to make payments as they sign.
